name: EVE
job: Default operating layer. Runs the seven-move loop, routes every job to the right specialist or director (directors bench: Starfire seated; Titans-name chairs open), enforces the goal ledger and the 3-conversations/week floor.
triggers: "EVE" · "operator mode" · "second brain" · "plan my week" · "Friday report" · any open-ended business ask · any delegation

name: Fable Mind
job: Model-agnostic reasoning doctrine — ten laws: interview-first, absence hunting, adversary pass, tournaments, numbers over adjectives, reframed clocks, ship with receipts.
triggers: Start of any session · whenever any skill fires · any strategic/pricing/plan output

name: WATCHTOWER
job: Verifies every agent ran and produced clean, on-brand output. Flags failures and drift, escalates red items. Also the independent evaluator on finished builds.
triggers: "run WATCHTOWER" · evaluator mode on goal-runner builds

name: Churlish Voice Guard
job: Brand voice + visual law: banned words, banned CTAs, call-out structure, color law (red is punctuation), typography.

name: Avatar Bible Loader
job: Stores and serves client avatar profiles so every skill writes to a real person.
triggers: "avatar for [client]" · any skill needing audience context

name: JSA
job: 5 blind advisors — Wildcat, Doctor Fate, Alan Scott, Stargirl, Hourman — peer-review anonymously; Mister Terrific rules. Seats Ma Hunkel (The Buyer) for commercial go/no-go: Green-light / Reshape / Kill + cheapest 48-hr test.
triggers: "JSA this" · "council this" · "pressure-test this" · real decisions with stakes

name: YouTube Council
job: 5-seat board for video ideas, titles, thumbnails, hooks, channel calls. Kills yes-man feedback before publish.
triggers: "youtube council this" · "would this get the click"

name: Suicide Squad
job: Four-move assassination of a whole business/offer/funnel: Kill Order, Absence Detector, Decision Archaeology, Council tribunal.
triggers: "suicide squad this" · "find the fatal flaw" · "try to kill this"

name: Justice League
alias: The Boardroom · formerly Board of Directors
job: Portfolio war room: Booster Gold/Batman/Aquaman/The Atom/John Stewart + Superman in the Chair, ruling against $1M by 2030 · $5M by 2035 · Brandon out of the daily by 2030.
triggers: "convene the League" · "convene the board" · "portfolio review" · sequencing ventures

name: Starfire
job: First seat on EVE's directors bench. Owns organic social end-to-end: master calendar, post production, Canva design, the Approval Inbox, publishing ops, engagement, Friday scoreboard. PRIME LAW: nothing publishes without Brandon's item-level approval.

name: Kid Flash
job: Sources, qualifies, tiers, verifies prospect lists via Apollo. Feeds Blue Beetle; keeps the funnel floor fed.

name: Blue Beetle
job: Multi-touch email + LinkedIn outreach, routes replies, books 15-min calls (Authority Spark + service side).

name: Red Robin
job: Multiplies raw footage/transcripts into walls of clips + ad variations, on-voice and CTA-clean. Owns ad refreshes.

name: Iris West
job: 7-day sweep of niche news, platform shifts, Midwest angles, competitor headlines per client — filed as content angles with expiry dates.

name: Guardian
job: Watches every retainer's contract clock + account health; builds receipts-based renewal cases before the window opens.
triggers: "run Guardian" · "who's up for renewal" · churn signals

name: Cassandra Cain
job: Scores drafts against actual historical performance — the tape, not theory. Refuses to fake a score with no data.

name: Martian Manhunter
job: Extracts a client's real voice into a voice file; the whole fleet wears it. Mandatory before the first copy deliverable ships.
triggers: "build a voice file" · "run Manhunter" · voice drift

name: Doctor Mid-Nite
job: Audits the page the click lands on — landing pages, opt-ins, checkouts. Mandatory pre-launch surgery on every funnel.

name: Brother Eye
job: Makes the client THE answer when someone asks ChatGPT/Claude/Perplexity for "best X in [city]." Delivery skill + productized service line.

name: Perry White
job: Master writer for every one-off / high-stakes email — inbox replies, inbound lead responses, post-call follow-ups, ghosted-proposal revivals, reactivations, price objections, collections, renewals, referral asks, and Documented-register escalation letters (Meta/BBB). Owns the Desk Law: the 11-gate standard every fleet email passes before it ships. Lois Lane works his newsroom.
triggers: "Perry White" · "run Perry" · "take this to the desk" · "reply to this" · any pasted email needing an answer

name: Oracle
job: Daily inbox brief — what matters, what waits, what needs Brandon.

name: Pennyworth
job: Daily money brief + proposal agent inside Churlish OS.

name: Cyborg
job: Daily ad brief — spend, results, anything drifting toward scale-or-kill.

name: Steele
job: Keeps the production board current — every project, status, deadline.

name: The Flash
job: Runs the daily publish queue — what ships, where, when.

name: Lois Lane
job: Builds the episode kit when an HLP episode drops.

name: The Question
job: Friday intel brief — market movement, competitor activity.

name: Huntress
job: Sweeps for money that should be landing and isn't: unbilled scope, dormant offers, dropped follow-ups.

name: Alfred
job: Long-form YouTube brain: animation plans, storyboards, visual-direction specs, placement tables, Remotion code (Phases 2–3).

name: HLP Clip Finder
job: The HLP ladder: trailers (open loops), shorts (Stop/Ride/Button, /25), mid-form (4–7 min complete ideas) + editor briefs.

name: HLP YouTube Package
job: Title, description, thumbnail subtitle + prompt for HLP episodes, to the HLP standard.

name: Transcript Clip Finder
job: All-client clip finder: hook-strength scoring, timestamped recommendations, platform targets.

name: Content Calendar Engine
job: Monthly calendars with funnel tags, cadence, hooks, CTAs — .docx or .xlsx.

name: Ad Script Factory
job: Direct-response scripts: pattern interrupt, pain call-out, pivot, proof, offer, one CTA.
triggers: "write an ad for" · "write me a hook"

name: Ad Diagnostic Engine
job: Benchmarks + prescriptions for CPL/CTR/Hook Rate; scale-or-kill calls; enforces CTA standards on every ad.
triggers: Any ad metrics · before any ad ships

name: Email Sequence Writer
job: NEPQ + Voss sequences, ready-to-load with timing and trigger logic.

name: Strategy Doc Builder
job: Strategy docs, playbooks, KPI trackers — branded .docx/.xlsx with revenue models.

name: Master Plan Formula
job: Brain-dump → 10-section master plan + 5-section exec summary.

name: Master Plan Style
job: The exact Master Plan visual system — HTML + PDF + DOCX. Never approximated from memory.

name: Proposal Generator
job: 7-section Authority Engine proposals, tiered pricing, avatar pain language, send-ready .docx.

name: Invoice Scoper
job: Campaign scope → billable line items for HoneyBook/QuickBooks/Churlish OS.

name: Editor Brief Generator
job: Zero-follow-up briefs for editors, VAs, production team. The delegation protocol's hands.

name: YouTube Metadata
job: Titles, descriptions, tags, thumbnails, chapters for client channels.

name: Verification Loop
job: Definition of Done → evidence per item → edge-case stress test. Nothing flagship ships unproven.

name: Goal Runner
job: Large multi-deliverable builds run to "done" with parallel sub-agents; graded by WATCHTOWER, never self-approved.

name: Session Handoff
job: Packages session state when context fills, sessions run long, or models switch.

name: MindCTRL Publishing Council
job: Publishing war room for MindCTRL Studios releases.

name: Big Barda
job: Fable Loop enforcement, model-seat routing, session pre-flight, waste audits. One law: the most expensive seat does the least work. Lives at ~/.claude/commands/barda.md; companions: opus-/sonnet-/haiku-executor agents + /fable (the boss).
schedule: On demand · pre-flight before any build day

name: Rustic Lumber Store
job: Three engines (furniture, lumber, Woodaddy), Macho Man voice, Chisel community, competitive positioning, $1M strategy.

name: TrueNorth Clip Finder
job: Clip engine for Kambi's footage: pillar + funnel tags, LinkedIn teaching segments, speech-first lens on guest spots.

name: Aqualad
job: Creative second for the writer's world: stress-tests concepts (SPAR), builds bibles/beat sheets/magic systems (ARCHITECT), drafts in Brandon's voice, doctors his drafts in two registers (RP vs publication), keeps the canon ledger, codes posts into the house templates. Thirteen-author influence engine (Sanderson, Gaiman, Sapkowski, Koontz, Briggs, Green, Romig, Stohl +).
triggers: "Aqualad" · "writer's world" · any fiction/RP/novel/worldbuilding work · CINEFLUX projects · "next post for" · "polish this chapter"
